name: Biome Australia Limited
analysis: BIO's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 57% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.2700, stop A$0.2475, target A$0.3400 (3.11:1) — then trail it.
